name: Jurassic World: Dominion
description: It has been 5 years since the Isla Nublar and Isla Sorna dinosaurs had escaped the Lockwood Manor. Dinosaurs now rule the Earth like they did millions of years ago. From the Velociraptors Blue and Beta residing in the forests of the Sierra Nevada to the Dimetrodons in the Amber Mines of Biosyn Valley in the Dolomites of Italy, dinosaurs are everywhere. In this bot, you're one of those DPG or DPW people trying to retrieve the dinosaurs and bring them to the sanctuary.
creator: PrehistoricPlanetFan
